title: 第2節　朝食の湯気
chapterTitle: 第3章　朝を持ち帰る

prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第3章　朝を持ち帰る / 第2話　汗が引くまで. Scene focus: 第2節　朝食の湯気 / セラパート. Summary: 建物の裏手の細い路地では、最後の尾行役がスマートフォンを耳に当てたまま、撤収の合図を送ろうとしていた。服装はただの配送員、立ち姿も地味だが、足の向きだけがまだマンションへ執着し… Key beats: 建物の裏手の細い路地では、最後の尾行役がスマートフォンを耳に当てたまま、撤収の合図を送ろうとしていた。服装はただの配送員、立ち姿も地味だが、足の向きだけがまだマンションへ執着している。任務の終わり際に残るのは、だいたいこういう諦めの悪い一人だ。 セラは路地の壁沿いを音なく詰め、相手の送信先がつながるより先に距離を詰めた。可愛らしいメイド風ジョギングウェアの白いラインが、朝の影のなかで一瞬だけ翻る。尾行役が振り向くより早く、端末を持つ手首を外へ払い、肩口へ一撃。スマートフォンは画面を割らずに手の中へ収まり、男は壁際に静かに沈んだ。 送信記録を消し、端末をジャケットの内側へ収める。あとは回収班へ位置だけ送ればいい。任務としてはそれで終わりだが、セラは数秒だけ窓の明かりを見上げた。サトーは部屋の中でパンを食べ、きっと今朝の感想を短くまとめている。 「その結論だけ、持っていてください」 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sera-part of the same breakfast-finale incident as scene-003-002-002-sato. Keep the same apartment exterior relationship and same bright morning calm as the paired image. Sato must remain an unaware background figure inside with bread and coffee, and must keep his attention on the table or window light rather than the incident. Sera must keep her gaze on the final tail or escape path, never toward the camera. The setting must read as the narrow service lane and rear facade of a modern Tokyo apartment building, not a detached house yard. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a cute maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a restrained final-tail action image with Sera dominant in a narrow service alley behind a modern mid-rise Tokyo apartment block, stopping the last watcher before withdrawal. Show rear apartment windows, exterior corridors or service doors, utility piping, and tight urban spacing rather than a yard or detached-house exterior. Keep Sato small inside a bright apartment room with breakfast, unaware and content. Sera must not look toward the camera.
